product.name: NCM811 cathode active material
product.description: Nickel-rich lithium nickel cobalt manganese oxide cathode material with nominal composition LiNi0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2.
product.target_use: Select patent sources that disclose a preparation route suitable for lifecyclemodel conversion.

queries.intent: Find direct NCM811 cathode preparation patents.
Find coating and surface modification patents that still disclose preparation data.
Find formula-based patents that may not use the NCM811 abbreviation.
Find precursor and sintering route disclosures.
Recover patents using generic nickel-rich language.

minimum_process_parameters: mass, molar ratio, concentration, or feed ratio
atmosphere or gas condition when calcination is used
review_thresholds.family_handling: Group by family before ranking; choose one representative patent unless family members add distinct lifecycle-relevant examples.
